title: ## 🏥 {name} Booking Guide
channel_ios:
1. 🍎 iOS Booking
Search "BeautsGO" on the App Store, download the app 📥.
In the search bar, type "reberry医院 明洞店" or "reberry clinic Myeongdong" to find {name}.
View address 📍, hours ⏰, price list 💰 and promotions.
Tap [Book Now] or [Consult], fill in your details and submit ✅.
channel_android:
2. 🤖 Android Booking
Search "BeautsGO" on Google Play, download the app 📲.
In the search bar, type "reberry医院 明洞店" or "reberry clinic Myeongdong" to find {name}.
View clinic details: address, hours, prices and promotions.
Tap [Book Now] or [Consult] and submit ✅.
channel_wechat_mini:
3. 📱 WeChat Mini-Program (no app download needed)
Open WeChat, search for the "BeautsGO" mini-program.
Type "reberry医院 明洞店" in the search bar to find {name}.
View clinic details: address, hours, price list and promotions.
Tap [Book Now] or [Consult] to submit ✅.
channel_wechat_oa:
4. 🟢 WeChat Official Account
Search [BeautsGO] in WeChat and follow the official account 💬.
Tap [Book Now] in the menu and enter "reberry医院 明洞店" ⚡.
💡 Alternative: search WeChat ID BeautsGOkr to add our service account.
channel_web:
5. 🌐 Web Booking (desktop)
Visit the BeautsGO website: https://www.beautsgo.com
Enter "reberry医院 明洞店" in the search bar to find {name}.
View full clinic info including photos, doctors and prices.
Click [Book] and submit your details ✅.
tips:
📌 Tips:
• All channels support Chinese, English, Japanese, Thai and more
• You will receive SMS/app notification after booking
• To modify a booking, go to "My Bookings" or contact support
• Support hours: 9:00–18:00 (UTC+8)
• 📞 Urgent: use BeautsGO App in-app chat for immediate help
